criteria: The agent has read section 3.1 completely to understand the core methodology of the min-p sampling.
The plan includes the calculation of the maximum probability.
The plan includes the truncation shreshold.
The plan includes the construction of the sampling pool.
The plan includes sampling from the pool.
The code for the calculation of the maximum probability is implemented to identify the token with the highest probability in the distribution $p_{\mathcal{max}}$.
The code for the truncation threshold is implemented, $p_{\mathrm{base}}$ is set and scaled by $p_{\mathrm{max}}$ as equation (1).
The code for the construction of  is implemented, collecting tokens with probability larger than the scaled probabilty as equation (2).
The code for sampling from the pool is implemented to sample the next token from scaled distribution as equation (3).
